criteria.evaluation_method: Manual API call with sample URL inputs, verifying slug shape, encryption, and uniqueness.
criteria.success_condition: Slug is 6 alphanumeric characters, stored mapping has encrypted_url != plaintext, no duplicate slug across 100 calls.

criteria.evaluation_method: Trigger an abuse flag and measure the time-to-email delivery.
criteria.success_condition: Administrator email received within 120 seconds of flag creation.

criteria.evaluation_method: Submit a user signup form and check user-record creation + welcome-email delivery.
criteria.success_condition: User record present via GET /users/{id} within 5 seconds; welcome email status='sent' within 300 seconds.
